title: Tribe finds New Location for Transportation Hub
summary: The Tribal Council is pleased to announce that the Kenaitze Indian Tribe has purchased the former Kendall Ford property in Kenai to serve as its transportation center. “Access to reliable transportation is a major barrier for many people in our community. title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: February 8, 2024
summary: February 8, 2024: The sea ice has increased (slightly) this week, and at a rate of 0.60% (from last week’s decrease rate of -0.36%), from the level on 02/01/2024 of 14.222 M km 2 to 14.308 M km 2 for this week. So, we are in what looks like a transition area between growth and decrease. It is still...

title: ANCSA 17(d)(1) Withdrawals EIS Presentation Follow Up Information

title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 5 February, 2024
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 5 February, 2024 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: The Alaska Music Podcast - Everything Fitz
summary: Premiering the new album from Pat Fitzgerald, "Last Bird Out", fresh from the microphones of Tenth Planet Records in Fairbanks.

title: Kawerak Resolute Against Proposed ‘NETS’ Study
summary: At their 2023 fall meeting, the Kawerak Board of Directors passed a resolution in opposition to the Northern Bering Sea Effects of Trawling Study (“NETS”) proposed by NOAA’s Alaska Fisheries Science Center. This experiment, scheduled for August of 2024, would use commercial bottom-trawl fishing gear...
